messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: A restricted front-desk Operator: the human is answered even while an Operator holds the slot
What it solves: DEPENDS ON BL-333 AND MUST NOT BE BUILT IN PARALLEL WITH IT: both tickets change
`operator_runtime.bb`'s tick and its status output, and this project has been bitten before by
two roles editing one file concurrently. BL-333 lands the observable (an Operator alive vs.
events actually being consumed,…
How it works: A message sent while an Operator is mid-conversation is still answered

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-334 - A restricted front-desk Operator: the human is answered even while an Operator holds the slot is complete.
